title: DHSContact
description: A DHS office, intake center, or public contact point — including the PATH family-intake center and adult-intake sites where New Yorkers apply for shelter. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Directory Of DHS Contacts' dataset (cete-9g3v, 14 columns). Located by address, phone, and full NYC geography spine.

departmentName.description: Office / intake center / department name ('Department Name').
